description: A campaign is performing better than expected, and the client has approved an additional budget. The manager needs to update the daily budget in the ad platform.

nodes.task_description: Identify the correct campaign in the advertising platform.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent selects the 'Q3 Lead Gen' campaign.

nodes.task_description: Increase the campaign's daily budget from $100 to $150.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully updates the budget setting.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the change has been saved and is active.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the new budget is reflected in the campaign settings.
